ab: Ci Canglah ko ngangan no widang ako, sakalecadto o wawa no pangcah cingra.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Canglah，他也是阿美族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Canglah, and he is also an Amis child.

ab: Malakapot kami i Makotaay niyaro’ micodad.
ch: 我們一起在港口部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Tafalong tribe.

ab: Hinatengilay kami malacafay to pakimad no matoasay, sakafana niyam somowal to soawl no pangcah.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說阿美語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Amis proficiently.

ab: Takarw masoso aca kako, paener makoli aca ci Canglah.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Canglah很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Canglah is short and thin.

ab: Tariktik saan ci Canglah, Kaolahan no ’alomanay cingra.
ch: Canglah很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Canglah is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
